name: bootstrap eval: report includes per-rule precision and recall against bootstrap fixtures (baseline metrics for F-2 trending)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --emit-report "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/bootstrap-eval-report.json" && grep -E "precision" .claude-tdd-pro/bootstrap-eval-report.json 1>&2 && grep -E "recall" .claude-tdd-pro/bootstrap-eval-report.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
